facebook.caption: 4.7 stars. 702 reviews. At a resort restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. That number matters because resort dining in Phu Quoc usually coasts on location. The Spice House Restaurant at Cassia Cottage Phu Quốc earns it. 702 people bothered to leave a review. Most don't. Put this one on the list. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
